channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Democrats Investigate Epstein's Foreign Government Ties
item.description: Convicted sex offender Jeffrey Epstein may have acted as an unregistered foreign agent and attempted to exploit his past relationship with President Trump.

item.title: Trump administration freezes over $1 billion in Medicaid payments
item.description: The Trump administration is withholding more than $1 billion in federal Medicaid funds from California and Minnesota until they take additional steps.

item.title: Trump says U.S. will soon bomb Iran's Pickaxe Mountain
item.description: President Trump stated Tuesday that the U.S. military will bomb Iran's Pickaxe Mountain, a deep underground site suspected by the U.S. and Israel.

item.title: Mike Johnson supports ban on lawmakers dating Hill staff
item.description: House Speaker Mike Johnson (R-La.) told Axios on Tuesday he supports prohibiting members of Congress from having romantic or sexual relationships with Capitol Hill staff.
